summary: Iteration 91: Directed Studio Mode Testing - All tests passed. Backend APIs (GET /api/studio/voices, GET /api/studio/music-library, POST /api/studio/projects, GET /api/studio/projects) working correctly. Frontend JSX syntax fix verified - DirectedStudio component renders correctly when 'Estúdio' campaign type is selected, step indicator shows all 4 steps (Avatares, Cena, Voz & Música, Resultado), avatar gallery displays user's collection. Start button correctly hidden in Directed Studio mode and visible in auto mode.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineView.jsx: JSX syntax fix verified - fragment closes correctly before scrollable container div
PipelineView.jsx: isDirectedMode state correctly toggles based on campaignTypes.includes('directed_studio')
PipelineView.jsx: Conditional rendering {isDirectedMode ? <DirectedStudio /> : <>...auto form...</>} works correctly
PipelineView.jsx: Start button wrapped in {!isDirectedMode && (...)} - correctly hidden in Directed Studio mode
DirectedStudio.jsx: 4-step flow (Avatares, Cena, Voz & Música, Resultado) renders correctly
DirectedStudio.jsx: Avatar gallery loads from /api/avatar/me endpoint
DirectedStudio.jsx: Multi-selection of avatars works with visual feedback (numbered badges)
studio.py: GET /api/studio/voices returns 24+ ElevenLabs voices with id, name, gender, accent, style
studio.py: GET /api/studio/music-library returns tracks as array (not dict) - fix verified
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects creates project in MongoDB with id field returned
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects returns list of user's projects
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Studio Project and TEST_Verify Project in MongoDB studio_projects collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directed Studio Mode feature fully working. Campaign type selector has 6 icons: Post Imagem, Post Video, Imagem + Avatar, Video + Avatar, Carousel, and Estúdio (Directed Studio). Clicking Estúdio switches to DirectedStudio component with 4-step wizard. Start button at bottom of PipelineView is conditionally rendered with {!isDirectedMode && ...} so it's hidden in Directed Studio mode. Backend studio endpoints require Bearer token auth. Music library returns array of tracks (not dict). Voices endpoint returns 24+ ElevenLabs voices.

login_with_test_credentials.details: POST /api/auth/login with test@agentflow.com / password123 returns access_token, redirects to /dashboard

navigate_to_marketing_studio.details: /marketing/studio page renders correctly with Marketing AI Studio header

campaign_type_icons_visible.details: Campaign type selector shows 6 icons: Post Imagem, Post Video, Imagem + Avatar, Video + Avatar, Carousel, Estúdio

directed_studio_button_click.details: Clicking 'Estúdio' icon switches to DirectedStudio component

directed_studio_step_indicator.details: Step indicator shows 4 steps: Avatares, Cena, Voz & Música, Resultado

directed_studio_avatar_gallery.details: Step 1 (Avatares) shows avatar gallery from user's collection with multi-selection

switch_back_to_auto_mode.details: Clicking 'Post Imagem' restores full auto pipeline form with briefing, platforms, etc.

start_button_hidden_in_directed_mode.details: Start button (data-testid='start-pipeline-btn') not visible when in Directed Studio mode

start_button_visible_in_auto_mode.details: Start button visible at bottom when in auto mode (Post Imagem, etc.)

api_studio_voices.details: GET /api/studio/voices returns voices array with 24+ entries, each with id, name, gender, accent, style

api_studio_music_library.details: GET /api/studio/music-library returns tracks as array (not dict) - fix verified

api_studio_projects_create.details: POST /api/studio/projects creates project in MongoDB and returns it with id field

api_studio_projects_list.details: GET /api/studio/projects returns list of user's projects
